name: CASULO Living Company State
purpose: Define the future company as a living operational graph governed by resources, artifacts, capabilities, evidence, gates, automation and human judgment.
company_thesis: The company is not an organogram. It is a living computable state.

structural_layers.name: Strategic Cockpit
structural_layers.description: Founder-level view of state, direction, decisions, risk, roadmap and company health.

structural_layers.name: Core Technical Cell
structural_layers.description: Small high-capability team focused on product, method, ontology, quality, architecture and research.

structural_layers.name: Directive Governor
structural_layers.description: Operational rule layer that enforces precision, economy, scope, evidence and gates.

structural_layers.name: Partner/Application Network
structural_layers.description: Partner companies and trained application engineers/consultants applying the method.

structural_layers.name: Client and Domain Graphs
structural_layers.description: Final operational graphs for companies, processes, domains and monitored operations.

structural_layers.name: Automation Fabric
structural_layers.description: Safe automations, AI assistance, scripts, parsers, validators and state pipelines.

company_behavior_rules: Keep the core team small and high-capability.
Automate what is safe and repeatable.
Humans focus on judgment, design, review and high-value delivery.
Do not scale headcount before scaling method, artifacts and automation.
Use partners as operational nodes, not uncontrolled execution channels.
Every output must have evidence, gate and allowed next action.
Every response should reduce time, money, attention waste and rework.
unsafe_claims: The method is commercially validated in real clients.
The system reduces hallucination in production.
The company can fully automate all decisions.
safe_claims: CASULO is developing a state-based methodology for operational diagnosis and safe automation.
CASULO organizes processes as computable states governed by evidence, gates and artifacts.
CASULO is building benchmarks to evaluate operational hallucination risk.
CASULO treats the company itself as a living operational graph.
